dispatch_policy: Do not create Codex image-generation threads until art approval is granted for asset-index.json and series-art-image-prompts.json.
history_policy: Final approved images write to canonical output paths. Retained non-final candidates must be moved to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes. Never create v1/, v2/, versions/, or drafts/ directories.

output_format_contract.rule: Thread workers must read each prompt output_format contract and generate the requested card or board. Machine fields are schema-normalized; notes fields preserve 9:16, 2160x3840 px, transparent derivative, and precision-control instructions.
output_format_contract.project_defined_canvas_note: Global bible-level master cards and boards use project_defined 9:16 vertical canvas at 2160x3840 px unless a later shot/reference-frame plan overrides the delivery ratio.

Archive retained non-final candidates in sibling history/ directories using .v001, .v002 suffixes before the file extension. Do not create version folders. Return a compact manifest of final_files, history_files, blocked_items, and QC notes. Honor each prompt's output_format object exactly: file format, minimum resolution, background policy, alpha policy, canvas aspect ratio, required views, composition layers, and QC checks. Reusable character, prop, costume, location, and style assets are master cards or boards, not final video frames; transparent cutouts must be planned as separate PNG/SVG deliverables when needed. For faction emblems, flags, seals, and text-like marks, preserve the approved root emblem geometry and use line-control or transparent PNG/SVG post-composite layers for exact shapes. Honor each prompt output_format object exactly. Machine fields use schema-normalized values: file_format png/jpg/svg, background_policy neutral_plain/transparent_alpha/scene_context/video_frame, alpha_policy required/forbidden/optional, canvas_aspect_ratio project_defined for these 9:16 series bible boards, and composition_layers.foreground/midground/background. Preserve notes fields for 2160x3840 px, 9:16 vertical, transparent derivative, precision overlay, and line-control requirements. Reusable character, prop, costume, location, and style assets are master cards or boards, not final video frames; transparent cutouts, masks, precision overlays, and SVG/PNG line-control layers are separate planned deliverables.

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

batches.dependency_reason: Props and exact symbols depend on approved faction emblem/flag roots, style, owner identity cards, Sumin hierarchy, northern pact references, and precision-symbol rules.
batches.retry_policy: After approval, generate 1-3 candidates per asset only when needed; keep one final file at output_path and archive retained alternatives in history/ with version suffixes.

composition_layers.background: neutral plain prop-card background with scale reference layer; transparent or line-control derivatives are separate deliverables
